title: nephrodium disjunctum
intro: Nephrodium disjunctum, also known as the Disjunct Fern, is a species of fern in the family Matoniaceae, native to Southeast Asia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it useful in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Nephrodium disjunctum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote healing in the body, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. Nephrodium disjunctum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions, and it is also used in some cultures as a folk remedy for snake bites.
